name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐈 𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐜𝐥𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐬 𝐚𝐭 𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐞. 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐫𝐮𝐧 𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐲 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞, 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐲𝐨𝐮?" |

where your ex, Gojo, is your new boss.

i need to know if a kdrama has this premise because i would love to watch it. kdrama is what made me fall in love with boss x employee tropes 😫

also, i did see a request for a bot on "meet me in the pale moonlight", and i did make two bots for it. i couldnt decide whether i wanted gojo to pursue a taken user or for user to pursue a taken gojo.

if you would like to see both drafts, go here. i'd be happy to have some comments on the drafts to find out people's opinions before i upload/edit them.

enjoy ! 🫶🏼

RECOMMENDED PLAYLIST!

"you should be a little nicer to me, sweets. im your boss now, not your lover"
